data.title: US Bitcoin ETFs Dominate Spot Volume with $10B Daily Trading – Is This Dangerous?
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/us-bitcoin-etfs-dominate-spot-volume-with-10b-daily-trading-is-this-dangerous/

data.title: BTC price prediction: Bitcoin slips below $110k as market selloff continues

source: https://coinjournal.net/news/btc-price-prediction-bitcoin-slips-below-110k-as-market-selloff-continues/

data.title: Binance to Suspend Conflux Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting from 2025-09-01 00:03 (UTC), the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Conflux Network (CFX) to facilitate a network upgrade and hard fork. This upgrade is scheduled to occur at Epoch Number 129,680,000. The trading of tokens on the Conflux Network will remain unaffected during this period, ensuring that users can continue their trading activities without interruption.

Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the upgrade, aiming to provide a seamless experience. Once the network is deemed stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. Binance has decided not to issue further announcements regarding the reopening of these services, emphasizing the importance of monitoring the network's stability before resuming operations. Users are encouraged to stay informed through the project team's announcements for any additional updates related to the network upgrade.

data.title: Crypto ETF market expands with 92 filings awaiting SEC decision
data.description:
Solana has eight ETF applications pending. XRP follows with seven ETF applications. Grayscale seeks to convert five trusts into ETFs. The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) now faces one of its heaviest backlogs in the digital asset space, with at least 92 cryptocurrency exchange-traded product applications awaiting review
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/crypto-etf-market-expands-with-92-filings-awaiting-sec-decision/

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature CeluvPlay (CELB)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will feature CeluvPlay (CELB), with Alpha trading opening on August 29, 2025, at 09:00 (UTC).Once trading begins, users with at least 220 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 3,200 CELB tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the score threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour.Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claims on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours; otherwise, it will be deemed that users have given up claiming the airdrop.

data.description:

Eligible users can subscribe to these locked products and enjoy the high APR rewards for seven days. To participate in the promotion, users must meet specific criteria during the promotion period

data.title: Binance to Launch DOLO Locked Products with 200% APR Promotion
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce a new promotion for DOLO Simple Earn Locked Products, offering an exclusive 200% annual percentage rate (APR) for a limited period. This initiative is part of Binance's latest token listing for DOLO, and the promotion will run from 2025-08-29 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-09-11 23:59 (UTC). Eligible users can subscribe to these locked products and enjoy the high APR rewards for seven days.

To participate in the promotion, users must meet specific criteria during the promotion period. New Binance users who complete identity verification or existing verified users who achieve a minimum spot trading volume of $50 equivalent are eligible. It is important to note that it may take up to 48 hours for eligible users to access and subscribe to the special offer. The seven-day offer begins on the day users subscribe to the DOLO Locked Products, and they can still receive the 200% APR rewards even if the offer period extends beyond the promotion period.

The subscription process follows a first-come, first-served basis, with specific terms and conditions applying. Rewards are distributed daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting two days after subscription. The APR rewards are calculated based on the subscription amount, APR, and locked period. Users must adhere to minimum and maximum subscription limits, which impact the APR rewards received. The promotion is part of a sponsored partnership with Binance's token partner, allowing for a competitive APR offering. Users can buy or deposit DOLO on Binance and subscribe to the locked products to benefit from the promotion. Binance reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions of the promotion at its discretion.

data.title: Binance Resolves Futures Trading Outage, Confirms Full Service Restoration
data.description: Binance confirmed that USDⓈ-M Futures trading experienced a temporary outage on Friday. The issue has been fully resolved, with all futures markets back online. User funds remained secure, and the platform emphasized reliability as its top priority.
